info.name: Dating App Backend API
info.description: Complete API collection for the dating app backend with authentication, user management, interactions, messaging, and chatrooms.

request.description: Create a new user account with email and password. Returns JWT token for authentication.
Login with email, username, or phone and password. Returns JWT token for authentication.
Get current user profile. Requires JWT token in Authorization header.
Initiate password reset process using email. Sends OTP to user's email for verification. Returns OTP code in development mode for testing.
Initiate password reset process using phone number. Sends OTP to user's phone via SMS for verification. Returns OTP code in development mode for testing.
Verify the OTP sent for password reset. Supports both email and phone verification. Returns a temporary reset token valid for 15 minutes that can be used for password reset.
Reset user password using verified OTP. Supports both email and phone. Requires identifier (email/phone), valid OTP, new password, password confirmation, and type (email/phone).
Reset user password using the reset token obtained from OTP verification. More secure alternative to the direct OTP method.
Request an OTP for email or phone verification. Currently returns OTP code in response for development/testing. Supports types: signup, login, password_reset.
Verify an OTP code for the given target (email/phone) and type. Returns success if OTP is valid and not expired.

Complete user onboarding after signup. Collects essential profile information including gender, sexuality, date of birth, interests, address, bio, and photos. For couples, partner sexuality and date of birth are required.

body.raw:
{
  "gender": "female",
  "sexuality": "bi-sexual",
  "dateOfBirth": "1992-08-25",
  "interestedIn": ["male", "female"],
  "address": {
    "street": "456 Oak Avenue",
    "city": "Los Angeles",
    "state": "CA",
    "country": "United States",
    "zipcode": "90210"
  },
  "bio": "Love traveling, photography, and meeting interesting people! Looking for genuine connections.",
  "mainPhoto": "https://example.com/single-main-photo.jpg",
  "photos": [
    "https://example.com/single-photo1.jpg",
    "https://example.com/single-photo2.jpg"
  ]
}

request.description: Complete onboarding for a single user (non-couple). Partner information is not required for individual users.
Check if user has completed onboarding and get profile completeness percentage.

body.raw:
{
  "gender": "female",
  "sexuality": "bi-sexual",
  "dateOfBirth": "1992-05-15",
  "interestedIn": ["male", "female"],
  "address": {
    "street": "456 Oak Avenue",
    "city": "Los Angeles",
    "state": "CA",
    "country": "United States",
    "zipcode": "90210"
  },
  "bio": "Updated bio: Love traveling, photography, and meeting interesting people!",
  "mainPhoto": "https://example.com/updated-main-photo.jpg",
  "photos": [
    "https://example.com/updated-photo1.jpg",
    "https://example.com/updated-photo2.jpg",
    "https://example.com/updated-photo3.jpg"
  ]
}

request.description: Update onboarding data after completion. Allows users to edit their profile information.
Get current user's profile information.

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "dateOfBirth": "1990-01-01",
  "gender": "male",
  "sexuality": "straight",
  "interestedIn": ["female"],
  "bio": "I love hiking and coffee!",
  "photos": ["https://example.com/photo1.jpg"],
  "location": {
    "type": "Point",
    "coordinates": [-73.935242, 40.730610]
  },
  "bodyHair": "trimmed",
  "eyeColor": "brown",
  "height": "5'10",
  "weight": "175 lbs",
  "bodyType": "athletic",
  "ethnicBackground": "white",
  "smoking": "never",

  "looksAreImportant": true,
  "intelligenceIsImportant": true,
  "relationshipOrientation": "monogamous",
  "experienceLevel": {
    "curious": false,
    "intermediate": true,
    "advanced": false,
    "newbie": false
  },
  "lookingFor": ["threesome", "full_swap", "soft_swap"]
}

request.description: Update user profile information. All fields are optional. Includes comprehensive profile data for physical attributes, lifestyle preferences, and experience levels.

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Sarah",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "dateOfBirth": "1988-03-15",
  "gender": "couple",
  "sexuality": "bi-sexual",
  "interestedIn": ["female", "couple"],
  "bio": "We are a fun-loving couple exploring new experiences together!",

request.description: Update couple profile with both partners' information. Includes detailed attributes for both individuals in the couple.
Get current user's dating preferences.
Update user's dating preferences including age range, distance, verification preferences, and advanced filtering options for body type, ethnic background, lifestyle choices, and experience levels.
Upload a single file to S3 with optimization and thumbnail generation.
Upload multiple files to S3 with batch processing.
Upload a profile photo with automatic optimization and user profile update.
Upload multiple profile photos (max 6) with automatic profile update.
Upload media for messages (images/videos) with optimization.
Generate a presigned URL for direct client-side upload to S3.
Delete a single file from S3 storage.
Delete multiple files from S3 storage in batch.
Add, remove, or reorder profile photos. Actions: add, remove, reorder.
Get information about a specific file.
Upload media files for posts with automatic optimization.
Create a new post with text, media, location, tags, and mentions.
Get posts for the user's feed, including their own posts and friends' posts.
Get trending posts based on engagement score.
Get posts by a specific user.
Get a specific post by ID.
Update an existing post. Only the post owner can update.
Delete a post. Only the post owner can delete.
Like or unlike a post. Toggles the like status.
Share a post with optional additional content.
Report a post for inappropriate content or other violations.
Create a comment on a post.
Get comments for a specific post.
Update a comment. Only the comment author can update.
Delete a comment. Only the comment author can delete.
Like or unlike a comment. Toggles the like status.
Create a new interaction (like, dislike, block, report) with another user. If both users like each other, a match is automatically created.
Get all interactions created by the current user.
Get all mutual matches (where both users liked each other).
Get list of users who liked the current user.
Get list of users who disliked the current user.
Get list of users that the current user liked.
Get list of users that the current user disliked.
Get list of users blocked by the current user.
Get list of users reported by the current user.
Remove a specific interaction (like, block, etc.) created by the current user.
Get all active matches for the current user.
Get detailed information about a specific match.
Delete/expire a match (sets status to 'deleted').
Send a message to a matched user. Supports text, image, voice, and video messages with optional self-destruct functionality.
Get all messages in a conversation with a matched user.
Mark a specific message as read by the current user.
Edit a message sent by the current user.
Delete a message sent by the current user.

query.description: Filter by gender (male, female, couple, non-binary)
Filter by interested in (male, female, couple, non-binary)
Filter by online status (true for online users, false for offline)

request.description: Get a paginated list of all active users on the platform with optional filters for gender, age, verification status, online status, and search. Excludes sensitive data like passwords.
Record that the current user viewed another user's profile. Source can be: search, recommendation, profile_link, other. Self-views are ignored.
Get a paginated list of users who viewed the current user's profile, with full user data (excluding sensitive information) and view timestamps.
Get a paginated list of users that the current user has viewed, with full user data (excluding sensitive information) and view timestamps.
Get profile view statistics including total views, views today, views this week, and unique viewers count.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Coffee Lovers Secret Club",
  "type": "secret",
  "description": "A secret room for coffee enthusiasts",
  "maxParticipants": 100,
  "rules": ["Be respectful", "No spam"],
  "blockSingleMales": true,
  "goingLive": "later",
  "inviteOnly": false
}

request.description: Create a new public, private, or secret chat room with enhanced features like blocking single males and live functionality. Creator automatically becomes moderator and participant.
Get all active public chat rooms.
Get all chat rooms where the current user is a participant.
Join a public chat room as a participant.
Leave a chat room and remove from participants list.
Send a message to a chat room. User must be a participant in the room.
Get paginated messages in a chat room. User must be a participant.
Get all public chat rooms that are currently live.
Join a secret chat room using a 6-character invite code.
Start or end live status for a chat room. Only room creator or moderators can control this. Action can be 'start' or 'end'.
Get detailed information about a specific chat room with populated member data.
Get the current user's friends list with populated user data, including profile information and ages.
Get another user's friends list with populated user data. Can be used to view friends of any user, whether they are your friend or not.
Send a friend request to another user. Cannot send to yourself or users you're already friends with.

query.description: Filter by status (pending, accepted, declined, cancelled)

request.description: Get friend requests received by the current user with pagination and filtering options.
Get friend requests sent by the current user with pagination.
Accept a friend request. Only the receiver can accept requests.
Decline a friend request. Only the receiver can decline requests.
Cancel a sent friend request. Only the sender can cancel pending requests.
Get friend request statistics including pending received, pending sent, and total friends count.

body.raw:
{
  "receiverId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
  "content": "Hey! How are you doing?",
  "messageType": "text",
  "mediaUrl": null,
  "replyTo": null
}

request.description: Send a personal message to another user. Supports text, image, voice, video, and file messages with reply functionality.
Get a list of all conversations with last message and unread count for each.
Get all messages in a conversation with a specific user. Automatically marks messages as read.
Mark a specific personal message as read. Only the receiver can mark messages as read.
Mark all messages in a conversation as read.
Edit a personal message. Only text messages can be edited and only within 24 hours of sending.
Delete a personal message for yourself. The message remains visible to the other participant unless they also delete it.
Get the total count of unread personal messages for the current user.

query.description: Filter by feed type (friend_request, like_received, match_created, birthday_reminder, etc.)
Filter by priority (low, medium, high, urgent)

request.description: Get personalized feed containing friend requests, likes, matches, birthdays, group invitations, and other notifications.
Get the count of unread feed items for the current user.
Mark a specific feed item as read.

item.name: Mark Multiple Feed Items as Read

request.description: Mark multiple feed items as read in a single request.

item.name: Mark All Feed Items as Read

request.description: Mark all feed items as read for the current user.
Delete a specific feed item.
Get feed statistics including counts by type and priority.
Send a 'Remember Me' poke to another user. Like a gentle nudge to get their attention.
Get Remember Me pokes received by the current user with pagination and status filtering.
Get Remember Me pokes sent by the current user with pagination.
Mark a received Remember Me poke as seen.
Delete/cancel a Remember Me poke. Can be done by sender or receiver.
Get Remember Me statistics including sent and received counts by status.

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "email": "john.doe@business.com",
  "phoneNumber": "+1234567890",
  "companyName": "2+1 Business Co.",
  "webUrl": "https://business.com",
  "location": {
    "country": "United States",
    "state": "California"
  },
  "isMember": false,
  "goals": {
    "promoteEvents": true,
    "buildAudience": true,
    "promoteClub": false,
    "promoteBnbHotel": false,
    "sellProduct": true,
    "paidAdvertising": true
  },
  "referralSource": "A friend",
  "additionalInfo": "Looking to promote our events and build a community."
}

request.description: Submit a business profile request. Requires JWT authentication. The request is automatically linked to the authenticated user. User data (firstName, lastName, email, phoneNumber) can be omitted if already present in user profile.
Get the current user's business profile request status. Returns the most recent request if multiple exist.
Get all business profile requests. Admin only endpoint.
Get details of a specific business profile request. Admin only endpoint.
Approve a business profile request. Updates the existing user's role to 'business' and creates a business profile linked to that user. Admin only endpoint.
Reject a business profile request. Admin only endpoint.
Report a chatroom, specific user in a chatroom, or a specific message. Report types: inappropriate_content, spam, harassment, hate_speech, fake_profile, underage, other.

query.description: Filter by status (pending, under_review, resolved, dismissed)

request.description: Get reports for a specific chatroom. Only accessible by room moderators, creators, or admins.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Erotic Parties & Clubs",
  "description": "A community for those interested in erotic parties and exclusive club events. Share experiences, meet like-minded people, and discover exciting events in your area.",
  "location": "New York, NY",
  "groupType": "open",
  "targetAudience": "couples",
  "category": "social",
  "tags": ["parties", "clubs", "events", "social"],
  "rules": "Please be respectful to all members. No explicit content without proper warnings. Follow community guidelines.",
  "settings": {
    "allowMemberInvites": true,
    "allowMemberPosts": true,
    "allowMemberEvents": false,
    "maxMembers": 1000,
    "minAge": 21,
    "maxAge": null
  }
}

request.description: Create a new group. Requires authentication. Creator becomes group admin automatically.

query.description: Search in group name, description, and tags
Filter by category: social, dating, events, business, lifestyle, hobbies, other
Filter by type: open, closed, private
Filter by audience: couples, females, males, transgender, business, everyone
Sort by: newest, oldest, popular, activity, name

request.description: Get all active groups with filtering and pagination. Public endpoint - no authentication required.

query.description: Membership status: active, pending, banned, left

request.description: Get groups where the authenticated user is a member. Requires authentication.
Get detailed information about a specific group including recent members. Public endpoint.
Update group details. Only group admins can update groups.
Delete a group (soft delete). Only group creator can delete the group.
Join a group. For open groups, joins immediately. For closed groups, creates a pending request.
Leave a group. Group creators cannot leave their own groups.

query.description: Filter by role: member, moderator, admin, creator
Filter by status: active, pending, banned, left
Search members by name or username
Sort by: newest, oldest, activity, name, role

request.description: Get group members with filtering and search. Public endpoint.
Invite users to join a group. Requires moderator permissions or above.
Get pending join requests for a group. Requires moderator permissions or above.
Approve or reject a join request. Action can be 'approve' or 'reject'. Requires moderator permissions or above.
Update a member's role in the group. Role can be 'member', 'moderator', or 'admin'. Only admins can promote to admin (creator only). Requires admin permissions.
Remove or ban a member from the group. Use action=ban to ban the member. Requires moderator permissions or above.
Update notification preferences for a group. User must be a member of the group.
Report a group for inappropriate content or behavior. Reason can be: inappropriate_content, harassment, spam, fake_group, violence, other.
Search groups by text query. Searches in group name, description, and tags.
